subcodes.first_line: From Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Prisoner and hath been numbered among the guided ones. Say: This is verily God's mystery which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی المسجون و کان من المهتدین قل هذا لسر الله الذی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
